summary.summary: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.3.4 to 0.8.3.5. (see diff:6929e9b00d32; file:07610cd6f6d6; commit:ed949dc15636)
summary.userFacingImpact: This is a change to build/development version metadata (APP_DEV_VERSION) in Config.xcconfig and likely does not alter runtime behavior; it primarily affects displayed/dev version or CI/build identifiers (evidence: diff:6929e9b00d32; file:07610cd6f6d6). If further impact analysis is required, request human review.
